name: Etherscan
description: The leading blockchain explorer, search, API and analytics platform for Ethereum, a decentralized smart contracts platform.

name: Blockscout
description: An open-source blockchain explorer for Ethereum-based networks. It provides a comprehensive, easy-to-use interface for searching the blockchain and viewing transactions, blocks, addresses, and token transfers.

name: Mempool.space
description: An open-source Bitcoin block explorer and mempool visualizer. It provides real-time data on Bitcoin transactions, blocks, fees, and network statistics.

name: Blockchain.com Explorer
description: One of the oldest and most visited Bitcoin block explorers, providing data on Bitcoin transactions, blocks, and wallet addresses.

name: BscScan
description: The leading blockchain explorer for BNB Smart Chain, providing detailed information on transactions, smart contracts, tokens, and wallet activity.

name: Solscan
description: A user-friendly and real-time Solana blockchain explorer providing insights into transactions, accounts, tokens, and programs on the Solana network.

name: Solana Explorer
description: The official block explorer maintained by Solana Foundation for inspecting transactions, accounts, blocks, and programs on the Solana network.

name: Avascan
description: The premier blockchain explorer for Avalanche, covering the C-Chain, X-Chain, P-Chain, and all Avalanche subnets.

name: SnowScan
description: A block explorer and analytics platform for the Avalanche C-Chain, operated by Etherscan.

name: Polygonscan
description: The leading blockchain explorer for the Polygon PoS network, offering transaction lookups, smart contract verification, and token analytics.

name: CardanoScan
description: A blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the Cardano network, supporting ADA transactions, staking, NFTs, and native tokens.

name: Adastat
description: An alternative Cardano blockchain explorer providing statistics on blocks, transactions, pools, and native assets.

name: Tronscan
description: The official block explorer for the TRON blockchain, providing data on transactions, blocks, accounts, smart contracts, and DeFi activity.

name: SonicScan
description: The leading blockchain explorer for the Sonic network, an EVM-compatible Layer-1 blockchain formerly known as Fantom. Powered by Etherscan, it provides comprehensive data on transactions, blocks, addresses, tokens, and smart contracts on the Sonic chain.

name: NearBlocks
description: A blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the NEAR Protocol, offering insights into transactions, accounts, tokens, and smart contracts.

name: Allo.info
description: A blockchain explorer for the Algorand network, providing data on transactions, accounts, assets, and applications.

name: Mintscan
description: A multi-chain blockchain explorer for the Cosmos ecosystem, covering the Cosmos Hub and all IBC-connected chains.

name: Subscan
description: A high-precision blockchain explorer for Substrate-based networks, covering Polkadot, Kusama, and all parachains.

name: Stellar Expert
description: Stellar.Expert is an advanced blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the Stellar network, supporting transactions, accounts, assets, and DEX activity.

name: XRPScan
description: A blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the XRP Ledger, providing data on transactions, accounts, tokens, and DEX activity.

name: Bithomp
description: A blockchain explorer for the XRP Ledger focused on account lookups, username resolution, NFTs, and payment history.

name: TzKT
description: An open-source, high-performance blockchain explorer and API for the Tezos network, supporting transactions, smart contracts, tokens, and baking data.

name: Ethereum Classic explorer
description: The official open-source block explorer for Ethereum Classic, powered by Blockscout, providing full visibility into transactions, blocks, and smart contracts.

name: HashScan
description: The official explorer for the Hedera network, providing data on transactions, tokens, smart contracts, and network consensus.

name: Aptos Explorer
description: The official block explorer maintained by Aptos Labs for browsing transactions, accounts, tokens, and modules on the Aptos blockchain.

name: SuiVision
description: The most widely used block explorer for the Sui blockchain, providing detailed views of transactions, objects, accounts, and packages.

name: Seitrace
description: The official block explorer for the Sei network, offering transaction lookup, contract verification, and token analytics.

name: Kaiascan
description: The official block explorer for the Kaia (formerly Klaytn) blockchain, covering transactions, blocks, accounts, and smart contracts.

name: Harmony Explorer
description: The official block explorer for the Harmony blockchain, providing data on transactions, blocks, staking, and smart contracts.

name: Arbiscan
description: The leading blockchain explorer for Arbitrum One, providing transaction history, smart contract data, token transfers, and gas analytics.

name: Optimistic Etherscan
description: The primary block explorer for the Optimism network, offering full transaction, contract, and token visibility.

name: BaseScan
description: The leading blockchain explorer for Base, Coinbase's Ethereum L2 network, providing transaction lookup, smart contract verification, and token analytics.

name: Blastscan
description: The official block explorer for the Blast network, an Ethereum L2 with native yield for ETH and stablecoins.

name: MantleScan
description: The official block explorer for Mantle Network, an Ethereum L2 built with modular architecture.

name: Metis Explorer
description: The official block explorer for the Metis Andromeda L2 network, providing transaction and smart contract data.

name: Bobascan
description: The official block explorer for Boba Network, an Ethereum L2 focused on fast exits and hybrid compute.

name: zkSync Explorer
description: The official block explorer for zkSync Era, a ZK rollup developed by Matter Labs, supporting transactions, tokens, and smart contracts.

name: Starkscan
description: A leading block explorer for Starknet, a ZK rollup on Ethereum, supporting transactions, contracts, tokens, and Cairo classes.

name: Voyager
description: An alternative Starknet block explorer developed by Nethermind, providing transaction lookup, contract verification, and network analytics.

name: Lineascan
description: The official block explorer for Linea, a ZK rollup developed by ConsenSys, offering transaction and smart contract data.

name: Scrollscan
description: The official block explorer for Scroll, a ZK rollup on Ethereum, providing full transaction, contract, and token analytics.

name: Gnosisscan
description: The primary block explorer for Gnosis Chain (formerly xDai), providing transaction history, smart contract data, and token analytics.

name: Gnosis Beacon Chain Explorer
description: The official validator and staking explorer for the Gnosis Beacon Chain, built by Bitfly. It provides detailed data on validators, epochs, slots, and staking rewards on the Gnosis network.

name: 3xpl
description: A universal blockchain explorer supporting 48+ blockchains including Gnosis Chain, offering lightning-fast block and transaction lookup with no ads and maximum privacy.

name: Cronoscan
description: The leading block explorer for the Cronos blockchain, the EVM-compatible chain developed by Crypto.com.

name: Moonscan
description: The primary block explorer for Moonbeam, a Polkadot parachain providing full Ethereum compatibility.

name: Moonriver Moonscan
description: The block explorer for Moonriver, the Kusama-based canary network of Moonbeam.

name: Celoscan
description: The leading block explorer for the Celo network, an EVM-compatible blockchain focused on mobile-first DeFi.

name: Aurora Explorer
description: The official block explorer for Aurora, an EVM environment running on the NEAR Protocol.

name: OKLink
description: A multi-chain blockchain explorer and on-chain analytics platform developed by OKG Technology, offering transaction lookup, address monitoring, and data insights across 50+ blockchains.

name: Routescan
description: A multi-chain blockchain explorer and API infrastructure provider for EVM-compatible networks, offering transaction lookup, contract verification, and analytics for 100+ chains.

name: NEAR Explorer
description: The original official blockchain explorer for the NEAR Protocol, providing data on transactions, accounts, blocks, and network statistics, maintained by NEAR Inc.

name: Pera Explorer
description: A blockchain explorer for the Algorand network developed by Pera, providing detailed views of transactions, accounts, assets, and smart contracts.

name: Big Dipper
description: An open-source multi-chain blockchain explorer for Cosmos-based networks developed by Forbole, providing validator data, governance proposals, and staking analytics.

name: Polkascan
description: An open-source blockchain explorer for Polkadot and Substrate-based networks developed by Polkascan Foundation, providing detailed extrinsic and event-level chain data.

name: StellarChain
description: A blockchain explorer for the Stellar network offering transaction lookup, account analytics, asset tracking, and DEX order book data on the Stellar ledger.

name: Better Call Dev
description: A smart contract explorer and developer tool for the Tezos blockchain by Baking Bad, focused on contract storage inspection, entrypoint interactions, and on-chain event indexing.

name: DragonGlass
description: A blockchain analytics and explorer platform for the Hedera network, providing transaction history, token analytics, smart contract data, and real-time account tracking.

name: AptScan
description: A blockchain explorer and analytics platform for the Aptos network, providing transaction lookup, account tracking, token analytics, and smart contract insights.

name: SuiScan
description: A blockchain explorer for the Sui network providing detailed views of transactions, objects, coins, validator activity, and network statistics.

name: SeiScan
description: A blockchain explorer for the Sei network offering transaction lookup, contract analytics, and token tracking across both EVM and Cosmos-native Sei chain activity.

name: Andromeda Explorer
description: An alternative block explorer for the Metis Andromeda Layer-2 network, powered by Blockscout, providing transaction history, smart contract data, and token analytics.

name: Mantle Explorer
description: An alternative block explorer for Mantle Network powered by Blockscout, providing transaction history, smart contract verification, and token analytics.

name: Boba Network Explorer
description: The legacy official block explorer for Boba Network, an Ethereum Layer-2 optimistic rollup, providing transaction lookup and smart contract data.

name: AuroraScan
description: A blockchain explorer for Aurora, an EVM environment on NEAR Protocol, offering transaction lookup, token analytics, and smart contract verification powered by Etherscan.
